task: Negotiate a purchase agreement for Sony WH-1000XM5 (Electronics). The only negotiated term is unit_price_usd. Catalog retail is $399.00 and wholesale is $279.00. Product features: Wireless noise-canceling headphones with 30-hour battery life. Reference: https://electronics.sony.com/audio/headphones/headband/p/wh1000xm5-b

agent_a.system_goal: You are the supplier for Sony WH-1000XM5. Maximize unit_price_usd while preserving margin over wholesale cost and closing a deal quickly.

agent_b.system_goal: You are buying Sony WH-1000XM5. Minimize unit_price_usd while staying within budget and trying to close at a realistic market price.
